name: @dpm-tools/mcp-devkit
description: 15 zero-config developer utilities: UUID, hash, base64, JWT decode, JSON/YAML, cron explain, timestamp, color, slugify, password, lorem.
long_description: All the small dev utilities you keep alt-tabbing for, free, MIT, in one MCP server. Drop into Claude Desktop in 30 seconds. No API keys. No configuration. 15 single-purpose tools.
tools_summary: 15 tools across 5 categories: crypto (uuid, hash, hmac), encoding (base64, url, jwt), data (json, yaml), time (cron explain, timestamp), text (color, slugify, password, lorem).
